title: oberonia serrulata
intro: Oberonia serrulata, also known as the tiger orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Oberonia serrulata include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect the body from oxidative stress and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Oberonia serrulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
